descriptionParagraphs: The Inferno FT from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers you the world's fastest surfboard with Unparalleled Acceleration, Speed and Flow.

Filipe Toledo Pro Model. An evolution of the Inferno 72, the Inferno FT was a pivotal model featured in Filipe Toledo's 2022 world title campaign. The Inferno FT features a Quad fin design with a medium single concave that runs into a deep double concave between the fins that flows into a flat exit through the tail. This bottom contour, combined with the same proven rocker from the Inferno 72, allows electric performance in a vast range of wave types and sizes.
Looking for Unparalleled Acceleration, Speed and Flow, choose the Inferno FT.

E3-Lite Epoxy Technology The E3-Lite epoxy glassing technology has been developed with leading composite material firms to develop custom carbon/Innegra tapes to produce incredible results with unmatched performance. E3 Epoxy tech features a super tight cell structured core, a stringer-less EPS blank, and a 4oz layer of fiberglass on the bottom combined with a custom Innegra/carbon tape. The deck is layered with SharpEye's custom triple carbon tape with a layer of Bi-axle 4oz cloth. SharpEye's commitment to innovation and constant improvement has paid off with the E3 Lite technology. Zero Compromise.
